title: GCC gives false array bounds error
body:
When GCC had warnings turned up on EH2 got this:

```
Vtb_top__16.cpp: In static member function 'static void Vtb_top::_sequent__TOP__208(Vtb_top__Syms*)':
Vtb_top__16.cpp:4400:54: error: array subscript 3 is above array bounds of 'WData [3]' {aka 'unsigned int [3]'} [-Werror=array-bounds]
 4394 |                              ? 0U : (vlTOPp->tb_top__DOT__rvtop__DOT__swerv__DOT__dec__DOT__tlu__DOT____Vcellout__tlumt__BRA__0__KET____DOT__tlu__dec_tlu_ic_diag_pkt[
      |                                      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 4395 |                                      ((IData)(3U) +
      |                                      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 4396 |                                       (3U & (((IData)(0x5aU)
      |                                       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 4397 |                                               * (1U
      |                                               ~~~~~
 4398 |                                                  & (vlTOPp->tb_top__DOT__rvtop__DOT__swerv__DOT__dec__DOT__tlu__DOT____Vcellout__bp_wb_ff__dout
      |                                                  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 4399 |                                                     >> 0x10U)))
      |                                                     ~~~~~~~~~~~
 4400 |                                              >> 5U)))]
      |                                              ~~~~~~~~^
```

GCC understandably didn't analyze that the conditional was protecting against the bad-index ever being accessed.
